title: Viewing report on specific automations

posts.author: Johanej (Johane Jean-Charles)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to have a filtered view of items which have triggered a specific automation. Right now, you can only view information on a particular automation through its run history but I would like a complete report (maybe on the main table as a filtered view or dashboard) of an automation and the items that triggered it.
